title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain adapter giving Ollama models first-class support for chains, agents, retrieval, etc.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, model manager, multi-user, dark mode, mobile).

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive CLI wrapper with chat history, model switching, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models inline as GitHub-Copilot-style suggestions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client for Ollama built on OkHttp; Kotlin & Android friendly.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem wrapping the Ollama REST API; includes Rails generator for quick prototyping.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama generators & embedders in production pipelines.

title: ollama-codex
summary: Drop-in replacement for OpenAI Codex using local Ollama models inside VS Code & Vim.

title: ollama-embeddings
summary: Official example repo showing how to generate embeddings with Ollama (nomic-embed, mxbai, etc.).

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that caches & serves Ollama models inside CI pipelines for reproducible LLM tests.

title: ollama-fastapi
summary: FastAPI service exposing additional endpoints (batch chat, SSE, auth) on top of Ollama.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt bot that answers questions using local Ollama models; supports threads and app mentions.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord.py bot bringing Ollama to any server with role-based model access and rate limits.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake providing reproducible builds of Ollama binaries and container images.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate offering strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained C# SDK for .NET 6+ with dependency injection helpers and Blazor sample.
